use_cases: Upload user profile pictures or avatars with instant image preview
Attach documents or files to support tickets in a helpdesk interface
Submit resume uploads in job application forms
Add media attachments to content creation or CMS platforms
Enable bulk file uploads with multi-file preview and removal in admin dashboards
ai_summary: A file uploader component featuring image preview generation, file removal with confirmation toast notifications, and smooth fade-in animations. Supports drag-and-drop style file selection with a clean, minimal interface that displays file previews or document icons. The component handles both image and non-image files, automatically generating previews for images while showing generic file icons for other formats.
